prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: unlock and achievement VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate VFX sprite sheet for meta unlock, achievement toast, and reward celebration feedback.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 sheet: unlock burst, achievement toast sparkle, relic reveal glow, mastery unlock ring, star pop, gold confetti, soft pulse halo, progress flare, reward beam, small celebratory trail.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability, transparent-style cutouts.
Composition/framing: 5x2 sprite sheet, centered effects with padding, no labels.
Lighting/mood: celebratory, rewarding, restrained enough for UI overlays.
Color palette: gold, white, teal, violet, warm amber highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid opaque full backgrounds.
